mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalProducts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalOrders, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2) AS totalAmount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT status, CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN status = 1 THEN '已支付' WHEN status = 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN status = 3 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT id, title, category, price, view_count AS viewCount, images FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, IFNULL(p.product_count, 0) AS productCount, IFNULL(o.order_count, 0) AS orderCount, (IFNULL(p.product_count, 0) + IFNULL(o.order_count, 0)) AS totalActivity FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ) p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT seller_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY seller_id ) o ON u.id = o.seller_id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY totalActivity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId}) AS productCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 4) AS soldCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND buyer_id = #{userId}) AS buyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId}) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT IFNULL(credit_score, 0) FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0) AS creditScore, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE deleted = 0 AND reviewee_id = #{userId}) AS reviewCount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(finish_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND seller_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND finish_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(finish_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(finish_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND buyer_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND finish_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(finish_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT id AS productId, title AS productTitle, view_count AS viewCount FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount FROM review WHERE deleted = 0 AND reviewee_id = #{userId}
